## Supreme Weapon Mod


Supreme Weapon is a Minecraft mod that adds bedrock custom weapons(in only 1.0-release nod) and armor for late-game gameplay.

### Features
- Adds bedrock weapons(in only 1.0-release mod) and bedrock armor
- Adds custom advancement such as "Welcome"(supports only 1.2.6-alpha, 1.0-release), "Diamond Biome!"(supports only 1.2.6-alpha, 1.0-release), "Bedrock Ingots!"(supports only 1.2.6-alpha, 1.0-release), "Cover me in bedrock"(supports only 1.2.6-alpha, 1.0-release), and "Diamond Portal"(supports only 1.0-release)
- Designed for testing and future expansion
-Grants "Welcome" Advancement when you join your world(supports only 1.2.6-alpha, 1.0-release)
- For example, if you attack with bedrock weapons and tools, most mobs will die in one hit.

### Compatibility
- Minecraft version: 1.20.1, 1.21.1 and 1.21.8
- Mod loader: Forge and NeoForge
- Supports singleplayer and multiplayer

⚠️ This mod is currently in **alpha** and **release**.

Features maybe incomplete in supremeweapon-1.2.6-alpha-neoforge-1.21.1 mod and supremeweapon-1.0-release-neoforge-1.21.1 mod.
